name: Nordic Retail Group — Headless storefront rebuild
description: Replacing their legacy Magento store with a headless stack. Tight Q2 deadline due to peak season.

name: Varuhuset AB — POS system migration
description: Looking to replace their legacy in-store POS across 12 locations with a cloud-based solution.

name: Ståhl Industri GmbH — ERP integration middleware
description: Need a middleware layer to bridge their SAP S/4HANA with three third-party supplier portals.

name: Fjord Collection AS — Guest CRM rollout
description: Evaluating CRM platforms to consolidate guest profiles across 8 properties in Norway.

name: NorLog Transport AS — Warehouse tracking rollout
description: Seeking a barcode and RFID-based tracking system for their Oslo distribution hub.

name: Bloom Creative Agency — Client self-service portal
description: Want a branded portal where clients can approve deliverables and view project status without email threads.

name: Paylink Financial Technologies — Subscription billing migration
description: Migrating from a home-grown billing engine to Stripe Billing to support multi-currency subscriptions at scale.

name: Beacon Media Group — Headless CMS implementation
description: Moving their 14 editorial sites from a monolithic Wordpress setup to a headless CMS architecture.

name: Helios Cloud AB — HR onboarding revamp
description: Rebuilding their employee onboarding flow to cut time-to-productivity from 3 weeks to under 5 days.

name: Mast Precision Components — Quality control dashboard
description: Need a real-time QC dashboard pulling data from three production lines to reduce inspection bottlenecks.

name: Amber Hotel Group — Online booking engine upgrade
description: Their current booking engine loses mobile conversions; want a responsive rebuild before summer season.

name: Port West Logistics BV — WMS mobile app MVP
description: Mobile companion app for their new WMS to enable real-time pick and pack operations in the Rotterdam warehouse.

name: MediNord Health Systems — Patient portal self-service
description: Patient-facing self-service portal for booking, results access, and secure messaging — GDPR and DPDPA compliant.

name: EduNordic ApS — LMS mobile app MVP
description: iOS and Android app wrapping their existing LMS with offline lesson caching for students in low-connectivity areas.

name: Nordhaus Digital GmbH — Client analytics platform
description: White-label analytics dashboard delivered to their own clients — expanding a proof-of-concept already in production.

name: Krone Payments AS — Compliance reporting automation
description: Automating PSD2 and AML reporting to reduce monthly compliance overhead from 40 to under 8 person-hours.

name: Volta Software — DevOps pipeline modernisation
description: Migrating from Jenkins to GitHub Actions with ArgoCD and introducing feature flags via LaunchDarkly.

name: Tallinn Business Academy — E-learning platform rebuild
description: Full rebuild of their Moodle-based platform into a modern React/Node stack with video streaming and certificates.

name: Stadtblatt Medien GmbH — Subscription paywall rollout
description: Introducing a metered paywall on their digital edition to diversify revenue away from display advertising.

name: Vitalia Kliniken AG — Telemedicine module
description: Video consultation module integrated with their existing patient record system and Swiss eID authentication.

name: Port West Logistics BV — Data warehouse build-out
description: Centralising operational data from 5 warehouses into a Snowflake DWH with dbt models and Metabase dashboards.

name: MediNord Health Systems — Lab system integrations
description: HL7 FHIR-based integrations connecting 4 regional lab systems to their new patient portal.

name: Paylink Financial Technologies — Merchant analytics dashboard
description: Real-time transaction analytics dashboard for enterprise merchants with cohort analysis and fraud flagging.

name: Helios Cloud AB — Public API platform
description: Won: developer-facing REST and GraphQL API portal with rate limiting, versioning, and interactive docs.

name: Nordic Retail Group — iOS/Android mobile app
description: Won: native shopping app replacing their previous PWA; launched with 50k downloads in the first week.

name: Ståhl Industri GmbH — IoT sensor integration
description: Won: MQTT-based sensor integration across 3 production plants feeding a predictive maintenance dashboard.

name: Bloom Creative Agency — Brand design system
description: Won: full Figma design system with tokens, component library, and brand guidelines for their rebrand.

name: Krone Payments AS — API gateway upgrade
description: Won: Kong Gateway replacing their legacy nginx proxy with centralized auth, rate limiting, and observability.

name: Nordhaus Digital GmbH — Data lake migration
description: Lost to a larger SI that could offer a fixed-price contract; client required ISO 27001 certification we do not yet hold.

name: Tallinn Business Academy — Student information system
description: Lost: procurement went to a public-sector framework vendor after a 3-month evaluation period; budget was re-allocated.
